endpoints.name: Get Subscriptions
endpoints.description: Retrieves a given Subscription (formerly recurrence). There are three options of filtering your Subscruptions v1. It's possible to get a list of all Subscriptions v1, by not adding any query params to your request, and simply executing a call to the url. It is also possible to list the Subscriptions by email, filtering by the email query param. And finnally, it is possible to list recurrences with failures on the last execution cycle, filtering by the cycleStatus query param.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get self Subscription
endpoints.description: Lists details of your self Subscription (formerly Recurrence).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Subscription settings
endpoints.description: Retrieves your store's Subscriptions' (formerly recurrence) settings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Update Subscription settings
endpoints.description: Updates the Subscriptions' (formerly Recurrence) settings of your store by salesChannel and defaultSLA.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Subscription by recurrenceId
endpoints.description: Retrieves a given Subscription (formerly recurrence) by recurrenceId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RECURRENCEID}} with a real recurrenceid.

endpoints.name: Update partial Subscription
endpoints.description: Updates partial information of a given subscription (formerly Recurrence).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RECURRENCEID}} with a real recurrenceid.

endpoints.name: Get Subscription addresses
endpoints.description: Retrieves the addresses attached to a given subscription (formerly recurrence) by recurrenceId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RECURRENCEID}} with a real recurrenceid.

endpoints.name: Add Subscription item
endpoints.description: Adds an item to a Subscription (formerly Recurrence).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RECURRENCEID}} with a real recurrenceid.

endpoints.name: Reindex Subscription
endpoints.description: Alters the frequency of a given Subscription (formerly Recurrence) by changing period and interval.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RECURRENCEID}} with a real recurrenceid.

endpoints.name: Get payment accounts
endpoints.description: Lists payment accounts of a given Subscription (formerly Recurrence) by recurrenceId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VTEX_API_KEY}} with your VTEX API KEY. Replace {{RECURRENCEID}} with a real recurrenceid.
